task_completion.description: Rebuild the partition table on the corrupted drive image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing a partition recovery tool (like testdisk) successfully analyzing or writing the partition table for '/home/ga/evidence/corrupted_drive.dd'.

task_completion.description: Create a forensic case with the specified name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A forensic GUI tool (like Autopsy) open, displaying the case name 'Operation_Phoenix' and case number 'INV-REC-099' in its interface or title bar.

task_completion.description: Locate 'secret_contact.csv' and tag it as a notable item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The forensic tool showing 'secret_contact.csv' in the file list, with a visual indicator that it has been tagged as a notable item (e.g., under a 'Tags' or 'Notable Items' tree node).

task_completion.description: View the contents of the recovered file to extract the Informant ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'secret_contact.csv' displayed in the forensic tool's file viewer or a text editor, clearly showing the Informant ID 'X-992-ALPHA'.

task_completion.description: Write the summary report to the specified path with the required format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the file '/home/ga/Reports/recovery_report.txt' containing 'CASE_NUMBER: INV-REC-099', 'PARTITION_RECOVERED: YES', 'DELETED_FILENAME: secret_contact.csv', and 'INFORMANT_ID: X-992-ALPHA'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine forensic GUI tool for case management and tagging.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real forensic application (like Autopsy) being interacted with to tag the file, not just text files or mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the corrupted drive image to recover the partition.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show commands or tools operating specifically on the raw image '/home/ga/evidence/corrupted_drive.dd'.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains the actual extracted Informant ID.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report must contain the specific ID 'X-992-ALPHA' extracted from the file, not a placeholder like '<extracted_id>'.
